title: Catatan Kaki Shift Ketiga
theme: Seorang karyawan menemukan humor gelap dan kebebasan aneh dalam rutinitas kerja lembur yang monoton, menyingkap absurditas eksistensial di balik tuntutan perusahaan.

cover.prompt: A deserted office cubicle in the deep quiet of night. The central focus is a computer monitor displaying a simple digital clock, glowing softly. Tall stacks of cream and white reports are arranged neatly on the desk. Gentle, ambient overhead illumination casts a serene atmosphere, with subtle reflections on the monitor screen. The overall composition evokes quiet contemplation and enduring solitude.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, subtle cool tones with a faint screen glow, minimalist composition.

meta.plan_summary: Jono, an exhausted office worker, finds dark humor and strange freedom during a monotonous night shift. He's pushed to his limit by an absurd email request, leading him to a small, symbolic rebellion against corporate demands by altering files and leaving sarcastic notes. He leaves feeling sardonically victorious, his perception of work forever tainted by the dark comedy he created.
meta.target_emotion: cynical amusement, relatable frustration, dark humor
